channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pope Leo declares traditional ‘just war’ doctrine outdated in call for peace and diplomacy
item.description: Pope Leo has formally rejected the long-standing Catholic ‘just war’ doctrine in his first major encyclical, titled “Magnifica Humanitas”, arguing that the theory has too often been used to justify ar...

item.title: Zanzibar records sharp decline in malaria cases after major improvements in prevention and treatment programmes
item.description: Health authorities in Zanzibar have reported a significant drop in malaria cases, showing strong progress in the fight against the mosquito-borne disease. The archipelago has become one of the leading...

item.title: Laufey and Tegan and Sara join guest cast for new Disney+ exclusive Simpsons episodes
item.description: Disney+ is set to release three new exclusive episodes of The Simpsons this summer, featuring a range of high-profile guest stars from music and acting. The announcement confirms that Icelandic singer...

item.title: US considers $250 commemorative note featuring Donald Trump amid 250th independence anniversary plans
item.description: The United States government is reportedly making plans to introduce a new $250 commemorative banknote that may feature President Donald Trump’s face as part of activities marking the country’s 250th ...

item.title: EACC Arrests Kenya Power Technician and Accomplice Over Alleged KSh 30,000 Electricity Reconnection Bribe
item.description: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) arrested a Kenya Power employee together with an accomplice after they were allegedly involved in soliciting and receiving a bribe to reconnect electri...

item.title: Kenya inflation hits 2-year high due to rising fuel and food costs
item.description: Inflation for Kenya don rise reach 6.7 percent for May, the highest since January 2024, as per the Kenya National Bureau of Statistics. This sharp increase mainly dey come from transport costs wey cli...

item.title: Caitlin Clark Sets WNBA Assists Record Despite Valkyries' 90-88 Victory
item.description: Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark became the fastest player in WNBA history to reach 500 career assists, achieving the milestone in just 59 games and surpassing Sue Bird's previous record of 82 games. ...

item.title: Vinesh Phogat Cleared by Supreme Court to Compete in Asian Games Trials Despite Maternity Leave
item.description: The Supreme Court of India on Friday allowed renowned wrestler Vinesh Phogat to participate in the selection trials for the 2026 Asian Games, scheduled for Saturday. The bench of Justices PS Narasimha...

item.title: US and Iran tentatively agree to extend ceasefire and ease Strait of Hormuz tensions
item.description: The United States and Iran have reportedly reached a tentative agreement to extend the three-month-old ceasefire by 60 days, though the deal still awaits official confirmation from both sides. Iran ha...

item.title: Aunty Donna launches Grouse House TV to support independent Australian comedy
item.description: Australian comedy trio Aunty Donna have launched Grouse House TV, a streaming platform dedicated to independent and experimental comedy. Their new interactive sketch, Bandersketch, invites viewers to ...

item.title: President Marcos opposes online Senate voting, insists Dela Rosa must attend physically
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. expressed his opposition to allowing senators to vote remotely in the Senate. Speaking during a press conference in Japan on May 29, 2026, he emphasized that he sees no ...

item.title: Chris McCullough leads TNT to crucial 3-2 advantage against Meralco in PBA Semifinals
item.description: In a crucial match of the PBA Commissioner's Cup semifinals, Chris McCullough emerged as the key player for TNT Tropang 5G, leading the team to a significant 3-2 series lead against Meralco Bolts. McC...

item.title: Topacio files petition against Elago for allegedly breaching disbarment confidentiality
item.description: Lawyer Ferdinand Topacio has filed a petition with the Supreme Court (SC) seeking to cite Gabriela party-list Representative Sarah Elago for indirect contempt. Topacio claims that Elago violated confi...

item.title: Blue Origin New Glenn Rocket Explodes During Hot-Fire Test on Florida Launchpad
item.description: In a significant development for the space industry, an uncrewed Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded on a launchpad in Florida during a hot-fire test on Thursday. This incident has caused a major se...

item.title: Kenyan High Court suspends US plan for Ebola quarantine facility amid legal challenge
item.description: A Kenyan High Court has temporarily halted plans linked to a proposed agreement between Kenya and the United States to establish an Ebola quarantine facility in the country. The ruling was issued by H...

item.title: Tanzania Prepares for Key Economic Talks with South Korea
item.description: Tanzania inahamu kubwa ya diplomat wake kuungana na maafisa kutoka Korea na nchi za Afrika kwenye mkutano wa mawaziri wa kigeni unaotarajiwa kufanyika Seoul kuanzia Mei 31 hadi Juni 2, 2026. Waziri wa...

item.title: NDLEA Recovers 498kg of Cannabis Hidden Inside Shrine for Edo Community
item.description: The Edo State Command of the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) don recover 498 kilograms of skunk cannabis hidden inside one shrine for Owan East Local Government Area of Edo State. Accordi...

item.title: RCMP investigate firearm theft from Salem, Nova Scotia home
item.description: The Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) are investigating after firearms were reported stolen from a private residence in Salem, Nova Scotia. According to the available report, the incident involved ...

item.title: Windsor automotive coatings manufacturer expands toward India amid Canada–India trade negotiations and U.S. tariff uncertainty
item.description: A Windsor, Ontario-based company that produces coatings for the automotive rubber industry is increasingly looking to India as a key growth market, amid ongoing uncertainty surrounding U.S. tariffs an...

item.title: CPS rules out further retrial in Manchester Airport assault case after jury deadlock
item.description: Two men accused of assaulting a police officer during a violent incident at Manchester Airport will not face a third trial after the Crown Prosecution Service decided against pursuing a further retria...
